metadata.description: Golden Q&A pairs for Aria RAG evaluation

questions.question: What was his role at Castus Info Solutions?
What university did he attend for his Masters?
What percentage did he reduce training cost by?
What LLM fine-tuning techniques did he use?
questions.expected_answer: LoRA and PEFT with Hugging Face Transformers and PyTorch

questions.question: How many years of industry experience does he have?
What improvement did he achieve in summary accuracy?
What degree is he pursuing?
questions.expected_answer: Master of Science in Business Analytics and Artificial Intelligence

questions.question: What is the capital of France?
questions.expected_answer: This information is not in the document

questions.question: Summarise his overall profile as a data scientist
questions.expected_answer: Senior Data Scientist with 4+ years experience, specialising in LLMs, RAG, fine-tuning, and ML pipelines
